flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Ellsworth Community College fell 18% between 2006 and 2009 (38.4% → 31.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Ellsworth Community College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (574 → 499).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ellsworth Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.0% → 0.0%).
